title: Broken Wings - Game Stages Edition
description: Fork version that add Game Stages compat
body:

[![curseforge](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/available/curseforge_vector.svg)](https://legacy.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/brokenwings-game-stages-edition)
[![modrinth](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/available/modrinth_vector.svg)](https://modrinth.com/mod/brokenwings-game-stages-edition)

[![github](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/compact/available/github_vector.svg)](https://github.com/JP-HellParadise/BrokenWings)
[![kofi-plural](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/compact/donate/kofi-singular_vector.svg)](https://ko-fi.com/korewalidesu)

## Broken Wings - Game Stages Edition

Thanks to the original author for making this mod possible!  
Check out original mod: https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/broken-wings  

### Original mod features:
- Disable creative fly from items (in different dimension if desired, by default DIM-7 from Twilight Forest)
- Choose the dimension IDs that flight is allowed in, disallowed in, or blanket-ban flight in all dimensions.
- Choose whether Elytra flight or wings from the Wings mod count as flying.
- Many countermeasures to enable and disable: Elytra flight, Wings mod, arbitrary items and armor pieces, arbitrary baubles...
- Add items, armor pieces, and Baubles as "bypass keys", which allow players to fly despite any rules in place. Bypass keys can work per-dimension.

### Additionals:  
- New config to disable bypass keys.
- Support GameStages, CraftTweaker (and GroovyScript in Java way).

### Infos:
- Enable `disable bypass keys` feature will ignore all types of bypass keys (include Baubles compat).
- The check for flying disability by order:
Check using config mode -> Check for compat (GameStages) -> Check if bypass keys is allowed (by enabled, and if the compat allow bypass keys, and is present in bypass keys list in config)

Check out this [wiki](https://github.com/JP-HellParadise/BrokenWings/wiki) for detail.  
Report issue to [here](https://github.com/JP-HellParadise/BrokenWings/issues).  

Summitted commission for Handeril.
